archimate:Requirement.name: Non-binding Instrument
archimate:Requirement.documentation:
Definition: Non-binding Instrument ABB is a Business Object, involving no obligation, which are available to the European institutions to carry out their tasks.
Source: EUR-Lex
Source reference: http://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/data/data-validation
Example: The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Opinion of the European Economic and Social Committee on Next Generation SME Strategy — Enhancing Effective and Swift Delivery (own-initiative opinion). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX%3A52021IE3668&qid=1664779252884
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: Legal view
Interoperability Saliency: The Non-binding Instrument ABB is a key salient for the legal and governance interoperability enabler as a specialisation of the Legal Act, it makes the recommendation of implementation of the policies and rules.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/Non-bindingInstrumentRequirement
ABB name: eira:Non-bindingInstrumentRequirement
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/Non-bindingInstrumentRequirement
Interoperability Layer: Legal

properties.value: Non-binding Instrument ABB is a Business Object, involving no obligation, which are available to the European institutions to carry out their tasks.

The following implementation is an example of how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): Opinion of the European Economic and Social Committee on Next Generation SME Strategy — Enhancing Effective and Swift Delivery (own-initiative opinion). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX%3A52021IE3668&qid=1664779252884

The Non-binding Instrument ABB is a key salient for the legal and governance interoperability enabler as a specialisation of the Legal Act, it makes the recommendation of implementation of the policies and rules.
